ddls:
CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  "league_type" TEXT /* Type of the league (e.g., domestic, international, tournament) */,
  "parent_league_id" INTEGER /* Parent league ID (optional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the team is based */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league in which the team competes */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* Logo of the team */,
  "home_stadium_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue which is the home stadium of the team */,
  "team_founded" INTEGER /* Year when the team was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "team_id_home" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "team_id_away" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "score_home" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "score_away" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance of the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_id_home FOREIGN KEY ("team_id_home") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_id_away FOREIGN KEY ("team_id_away") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach manages */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "coach_type" TEXT /* Type of coach (e.g., head coach, assistant coach) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Forward, Midfielder) */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "player_image" TEXT /* Image of the player */,
  "player_worth" REAL /* Current market worth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury report */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player affected by the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury reported */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date the injury was reported */,
  "expected_return" TEXT /* Expected return date for the player */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "recovery_status" TEXT /* Recovery status of the player (e.g., recovering, recovered, not recovering) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_coverage" (
  "coverage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media coverage entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team covered by the media */,
  "media_source" TEXT /* Source of the media coverage */,
  "coverage_date" TEXT /* Date of the coverage */,
  "coverage_type" TEXT /* Type of coverage (e.g., Article, Video) */,
  "coverage_title" TEXT /* Title of the coverage */,
  "coverage_url" TEXT /* URL of the coverage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coverage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_coverage_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
